subsections.text: The statewide traffic safety program must include:
a driver education and training program administered by the governor through appropriate agencies that complies with Section 723.013 (Driver Education and Training Program) ;
plans for local traffic safety programs by legal and political subdivisions of this state that may be implemented if the programs:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: are approved by the governor; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: conform with uniform standards adopted under the Highway Safety Act of 1966 (23 U.S.C. Sec. 401 et seq.).

history.raw: Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 103, eff. September 1, 2023.
